title: taraxacum proximiforme
intro: Taraxacum proximiforme, also known as the small-leaved dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum proximiforme include its ability to support digestive health, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural antioxidant, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used as a food ingredient in salads and as a coffee substitute.
